parameters.query:
WITH price_rows AS (
  SELECT a.id AS armor_id, p.uex_terminal_id, p.buy_price, p.sell_price
  FROM datap4k_armor_norm a
  JOIN prices p ON p.item_uuid = a.uex_uuid AND p.asset_type = 'item'
  WHERE NULLIF(a.uex_uuid, '') IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT a.id AS armor_id, p.uex_terminal_id, p.buy_price, p.sell_price
  FROM datap4k_armor_norm a
  JOIN prices p ON p.item_external_id = a.uex_id AND p.asset_type = 'item'
  WHERE NULLIF(a.uex_uuid, '') IS NULL AND a.uex_id IS NOT NULL
),
sold_at_uex AS (
  SELECT
    pr.armor_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_source_id',  tt.source_id,
        'terminal_name',       tt.name,
        'terminal_type',       tt.terminal_type,
        'terminal_code',       tt.metadata->>'code',
        'terminal_screenshot', tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live',   (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
        'location_name',       COALESCE(
          tt.metadata->>'space_station_name',
          tt.metadata->>'outpost_name',
          tt.metadata->>'city_name'
        ),
        'system_name',         tt.metadata->>'star_system_name',
        'planet_name',         tt.metadata->>'planet_name',
        'moon_name',           tt.metadata->>'moon_name',
        'buy_price',           pr.buy_price,
        'sell_price',          pr.sell_price
      ) ORDER BY tt.name
    ) FILTER (WHERE tt.id IS NOT NULL) AS sold_at
  FROM price_rows pr
  JOIN trade_terminals tt
    ON concat('terminals:', pr.uex_terminal_id::text) = tt.source_id
  GROUP BY pr.armor_id
),
sold_at_dp4k AS (
  SELECT
    a.id AS armor_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_source_id',  si.terminal_source_id,
        'terminal_name',       tt.name,
        'terminal_type',       tt.terminal_type,
        'terminal_code',       tt.metadata->>'code',
        'terminal_screenshot', tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live',   (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
        'shop',                si.shop,
        'location',            si.location,
        'system_name',         tt.metadata->>'star_system_name',
        'planet_name',         tt.metadata->>'planet_name',
        'moon_name',           tt.metadata->>'moon_name',
        'buy_auec',            si.buy_auec,
        'sell_auec',           si.sell_auec
      ) ORDER BY tt.name
    ) FILTER (WHERE tt.id IS NOT NULL) AS sold_at_dp4k
  FROM datap4k_armor_norm a
  JOIN datap4k_shop_inventory si
    ON si.item_raw_id = a.raw_id AND si.item_raw_table = 'datap4k_armor_raw'
  JOIN trade_terminals tt
    ON si.terminal_source_id = tt.source_id
  GROUP BY a.id
),
variant_list AS (
  SELECT
    v.variant_of AS base_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id',        v.id,
        'slug',      v.slug,
        'name',      v.name,
        'file',      v.file,
        'source_id', v.source_id,
        'uex_id',    v.uex_id,
        'uex_uuid',  v.uex_uuid
      ) ORDER BY v.name
    ) AS variants
  FROM datap4k_armor_norm v
  WHERE v.variant_of IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY v.variant_of
),
base_info AS (
  SELECT
    v.id       AS variant_id,
    b.slug     AS base_slug,
    b.name     AS base_name
  FROM datap4k_armor_norm v
  JOIN datap4k_armor_norm b ON b.id = v.variant_of
  WHERE v.variant_of IS NOT NULL
),
armor_set_data AS (
  SELECT
    asm.armor_slug,
    asm.set_slug,
    asm.set_name,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'slug', a2.slug,
        'name', a2.name,
        'slot', a2.slot
      ) ORDER BY a2.slot, a2.slug  -- stable order; shorter slug wins on dedup below
    ) FILTER (WHERE a2.slug IS NOT NULL) AS set_members
  FROM armor_set_map asm
  -- exclude nodraw from both the row being built AND the members list
  JOIN armor_set_map asm2
    ON  asm2.set_slug    = asm.set_slug
    AND asm2.armor_slug  NOT LIKE 'nodraw-%'
  JOIN datap4k_armor_norm a2
    ON  a2.slug          = asm2.armor_slug
    AND a2.variant_of    IS NULL
    AND a2.slug          NOT LIKE 'nodraw-%'
  WHERE asm.armor_slug NOT LIKE 'nodraw-%'
  GROUP BY asm.armor_slug, asm.set_slug, asm.set_name
),
armor_crafting_data AS (
  SELECT
    a.id AS armor_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'family',         cn.family,
        'variant_name',   cn.variant_name,
        'category',       cn.category,
        'craft_time_sec', cn.craft_time_sec,
        'slots',          cn.slots,
        'totals',         cn.totals
      ) ORDER BY cn.family, cn.variant_name
    ) AS crafting
  FROM datap4k_armor_norm a
  -- LATERAL: deduplicate per armor piece by unique (totals, craft_time_sec)
  -- Collapses identical recipes across different families; keeps genuinely different totals
  JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (cn2.totals::text, cn2.craft_time_sec)
      cn2.family, cn2.variant_name, cn2.category, cn2.craft_time_sec, cn2.slots, cn2.totals
    FROM datap4k_crafting_norm cn2
    WHERE cn2.category          = 'armour'
      AND cn2.manufacturer_code = upper(split_part(a.file,'_',1))
      AND (
        SELECT bool_and(a.file ILIKE '%' || word || '%')
        FROM unnest(string_to_array(lower(cn2.family),' ')) AS word
        WHERE word NOT IN (lower(upper(split_part(a.file,'_',1))), 'armor')
      )
    ORDER BY cn2.totals::text, cn2.craft_time_sec,
             CASE WHEN cn2.variant_name = 'Base' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
             cn2.family, cn2.variant_name
  ) cn ON true
  GROUP BY a.id
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  a.slug,
  'armor',
  a.name,
  a.manufacturer,
  a.uex_category_name,
  a.uex_id,
  a.is_base_variant,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',                  a.name,
    'file',                  a.file,
    'slot',                  a.slot,
    'tier',                  a.tier,
    'manufacturer',          COALESCE(NULLIF(ml.canonical_name, ''), NULLIF(a.manufacturer, '')),
    'micro_scu',             a.micro_scu,
    'container_scu',         a.container_scu,
    'temp_min_c',            a.temp_min_c,
    'temp_max_c',            a.temp_max_c,
    'rad_capacity',          a.rad_capacity,
    'rad_diss_rate',         a.rad_diss_rate,
    'dmg_res_physical',      a.dmg_res_physical,
    'dmg_res_energy',        a.dmg_res_energy,
    'dmg_res_distortion',    a.dmg_res_distortion,
    'dmg_res_biochemical',   a.dmg_res_biochemical,
    'dmg_res_stun',          a.dmg_res_stun,
    'dmg_res_force',         a.dmg_res_force,
    'dmg_res_thermal',       a.dmg_res_thermal,
    'sig_ir_emission',       a.sig_ir_emission,
    'sig_ir_reduce_abs',     a.sig_ir_reduce_abs,
    'sig_em_emission',       a.sig_em_emission,
    'sig_em_reduce_abs',     a.sig_em_reduce_abs,
    'source_id',             a.source_id,
    'source_slug',           a.source_slug,
    'uex_id',                a.uex_id,
    'uex_uuid',              a.uex_uuid,
    'uex_slug',              el.uex_slug,
    'uex_link_match',        el.match_field,
    'uex_category_id',       a.uex_category_id,
    'uex_category_name',     a.uex_category_name,
    'uex_category_section',  a.uex_category_section,
    'is_base_variant',       a.is_base_variant,
    'variant_of',            a.variant_of,
    'base_slug',             bi.base_slug,
    'base_name',             bi.base_name,
    'variants',              COALESCE(vl.variants, '[]'::jsonb),
    'sold_at',               COALESCE(sau.sold_at,        '[]'::jsonb),
    'sold_at_dp4k',          COALESCE(sadp.sold_at_dp4k,  '[]'::jsonb),
    'crafting',              COALESCE(acd.crafting,        '[]'::jsonb),
    'set_slug',              asd.set_slug,
    'set_name',              asd.set_name,
    'set_members',           COALESCE(asd.set_members,     '[]'::jsonb),
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(a.name, '')                 || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(a.manufacturer, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(a.slot, '')                 || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(a.tier, '')                 || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(a.uex_category_name, '')    || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(a.uex_category_section, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM datap4k_armor_norm a
LEFT JOIN datap4k_entity_links el      ON el.id = a.entity_link_id
LEFT JOIN sold_at_uex sau              ON sau.armor_id  = a.id
LEFT JOIN sold_at_dp4k sadp            ON sadp.armor_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN variant_list vl              ON vl.base_id    = a.id
LEFT JOIN base_info bi                 ON bi.variant_id  = a.id
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc     ON esc.entity_type = 'armor' AND esc.datap4k_slug = a.slug
LEFT JOIN manufacturer_lookup ml       ON ml.alias = a.manufacturer
LEFT JOIN armor_crafting_data acd      ON acd.armor_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN armor_set_data asd           ON asd.armor_slug = a.slug
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
